visit_summary: A complete, clean Peppa Pig cruise ship set in great cosmetic shape. Definitely worth a trip to pick up!
alignment_summary: The description accurately details the cruise ship, the three specific figures, and the beach-themed accessories shown in the photo.

reasons.text: All items described—including the three figures, slide, pool, and chairs—are clearly laid out and visible in the photo.
The plastic components, hinges, and fold-out panel appear structurally sound with no visible stress marks or cracks.
The toy is a manual playset with no complex electronic or motorized parts, minimizing the risk of hidden defects.

seller_questions: Does the side panel fold up and latch securely when closing the ship?
Are there any cracks or loose hinges on the fold-out sections?
Is the price firm, and what are your general pickup windows?
seller_message_draft: Hi! I'm interested in your Peppa Pig cruise ship playset. Does the side panel fold up and latch securely? If so, I'd love to arrange a time to pick it up. Thanks!
limitations: The photo does not show the ship fully closed, so hinge tension and latch security cannot be fully verified.
Small scuffs or minor scratches on the plastic might not be visible under this lighting.
We cannot verify if every tiny accessory from the original retail box is present, though the set looks highly complete.
research_recommended: Compare with retail 'Peppa's Cruise Ship' listings to confirm if any minor accessories are missing.
Check for any active product recalls on Hasbro Peppa Pig playsets.
future_capability_note: We don't verify prices, recalls, or seller history yet — you'll need to check these yourself. A future version of this product will do that research for you.
